name: DJConnect iOS 3.1.51
body:
# DJConnect App 3.1.51

## Ask DJ

- Added the read-only technical track analysis contract for Ask DJ responses.
- Ask DJ can now show compact interpretive Track Insight such as genre,
  energy, production, listening cues and analysis sources when Home Assistant
  returns them.
- The empty Ask DJ screen now includes a technical track analysis example
  prompt.

---

Platform: iOS

Unsigned CI artifacts are intended for diagnostics and internal validation.
Unsigned iOS binaries are published here for diagnostics and internal validation. For normal iOS distribution, use TestFlight/App Store.
